subjects.description: A small child wearing a bright red hooded jacket and dark trousers, stepping off the curb to cross the alpine-village street directly in the vehicle's path
subjects.appearance_details: Carries a small backpack, wears hiking sneakers, cheeks flushed in the mountain air; the red jacket clear against the autumn foliage
subjects.relationship: The pedestrian hazard that prompts the ego vehicle to brake; the central reason for the deceleration event
subjects.location: Center foreground, crossing from right sidewalk into the road
subjects.orientation: Profile view, facing left as the child walks across the road
subjects.pose: Mid-stride, one leg forward, arms slightly swinging while walking
subjects.action: Steps off the sidewalk and begins crossing the road
subjects.state_changes: Moves from curb into roadway, continuing across the vehicle's path and pausing briefly mid-road
subjects.clothing: Bright red hooded jacket, dark trousers, hiking sneakers, small backpack
subjects.expression: Unaware and casual, looking ahead across the street
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: Fair, smooth youthful skin with cold-flushed cheeks
subjects.facial_features: Round face, light brown hair, small features, rosy cheeks

subjects.description: A few parked cars along the curbs of the alpine-village street amid the autumn foliage
subjects.appearance_details: Compact wagons and hatchbacks in muted colors, roof racks for the mountains, warm side light on their panels
subjects.relationship: Part of the residential environment; potential occlusion that hides the child until they step out
subjects.location: Left and right midground along the curbs
subjects.orientation: Parallel-parked, facing toward and away from camera along the road edges

background_setting: An alpine-village residential street in the late afternoon, backed by forested mountain slopes in full autumn color under a partly cloudy sky. Timber chalets with carved balconies and stacked firewood line a two-lane dry-asphalt road that climbs gently through the village. Golden larches and rust-red maples flank the curbs where a few parked cars sit; stone-edged sidewalks run beside the homes. Warm side light rakes across the valley while drifting cloud shadows sweep the road and its faded center markings.

lighting.conditions: Warm late-afternoon alpine sunlight with passing clouds
lighting.direction: Low warm side light from the west across the valley
lighting.shadows: Long, warm side shadows crossed intermittently by drifting cloud shadow
lighting.illumination_effect: Warm raking light glowing on autumn foliage and chalet timber, alternating with soft cloud-shadow; the child's red jacket harmonizes with the fall colors yet stays distinct

aesthetics.composition: Centered forward-facing ego perspective with the road vanishing toward the horizon, child positioned in the central lane, parked cars framing the sides
aesthetics.color_scheme: Golden larch and rust-red maple foliage, warm timber chalets, grey mountain rock, dry asphalt, and a clear red accent from the child's jacket
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Crisp, scenic alpine-afternoon calm heightened by sudden caution
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating chalets and woodpiles, autumn trees, a few parked cars, mountain slopes behind

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward-moving ego dashcam motion that decelerates and comes to a complete stop
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from the driver's viewpoint
cinematography.focus: Sharp focus on the road ahead and the crossing child

context: Autonomous driving or ADAS demonstration of pedestrian detection and emergency braking in a residential setting

actions.description: The ego vehicle travels forward at a moderate speed up the alpine-village residential street in warm afternoon light.
A small child in a red jacket steps off the right sidewalk and begins crossing into the vehicle's path.
The ego vehicle promptly applies firm, controlled braking on the dry asphalt, decelerating as the nose dips slightly.
The vehicle reaches a complete stop well before the child and remains fully stopped while the child continues across.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: White painted text on the dry asphalt, partially faded, warmed by the low afternoon side light
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the road surface ahead, visible in the center of frame throughout
text_and_signage_elements.context: Traffic calming marking indicating a low-speed residential zone

segments.description: Ego vehicle cruises forward up the alpine-village street, autumn foliage and chalets along the road under drifting cloud shadow.
segments.key_changes: Steady forward motion at moderate speed
segments.camera: Forward dashcam motion, smooth and steady

segments.description: A child steps off the sidewalk into the road; the vehicle begins firm, controlled braking and decelerates rapidly.
segments.key_changes: Hazard appears; speed drops sharply, nose dips under braking
segments.camera: Forward motion slowing, slight forward pitch from deceleration

segments.description: The vehicle comes to a complete stop well before the child and holds stationary as the child crosses safely amid the fall colors.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle fully stopped and held stationary

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam moves forward up an alpine-village residential street in warm late-afternoon light, autumn foliage and chalets flanking the road beneath forested slopes. By 0:01 a small child in a bright red jacket steps off the right sidewalk and begins crossing directly ahead. From 0:01 to 0:03 the ego vehicle applies firm, controlled braking, slowing with a slight forward pitch as a cloud shadow drifts across. By 0:03 the vehicle has stopped completely well before the child, and from 0:03 to 0:05 it holds stationary while the child crosses safely.
audio_description: Crisp alpine afternoon sounds of a light mountain breeze, distant cowbells, and birds, the hum of the vehicle over dry asphalt, then firm tire and brake friction as it decelerates, settling into a quiet idle with the mountain breeze.
